dailyNews.title: ‘Humanitarian catastrophe’: While the world is focused on the war in Iran, something much worse is unfolding in Lebanon
dailyNews.description: Following the US-Israeli Operation Epic Fury against Iran, Israel's ground invasion of Lebanon has led to significant civilian casualties and displacement. UNICEF reports over 370,000 children have been uprooted, with many facing dire living conditions amid ongoing violence and humanitarian crises.

dailyNews.title: Congress releases list of 16 candidates for upcoming Puducherry elections
dailyNews.description: DPR Selvam will contest from Mannadipattu, while P Karthikeyan has been fielded from Oosudu.

dailyNews.title: Hawaii doctor’s ex-boss says anesthesiologists have means to kill as wife testifies about syringe attack

dailyNews.title: Trump Delays Strikes on Iran's Energy Sector for 10 More Days
dailyNews.description: After nearly one month of war, the United States, Israel and Iran are continuing to trade air and drone strikes. Now President Donald Trump says they’re also trading potential peace plans but Iran is continuing to publicly dispute that any talks are underway. It comes as the president is extending a deadline he gave Iran to open the Strait of Hormuz of face attacks against its power plants. NBC’s Garrett Haake reports for TODAY from the White House.

dailyNews.title: Ambitious, authoritarian and talking to Trump? The hard-liners rising in Iran
dailyNews.description: The Israeli military has systematically killed Iran’s top leaders, so when President Donald Trump said this week that talks are being held with Iran, the biggest question was: Who exactly is the U.S. talking to

dailyNews.title: Concerns about insider trading on the Iran war are growing. Can anyone police the bets?
dailyNews.description: Fears are growing about insider trading on U.S. policy and military plans on prediction markets. But the Trump administration has been slow to crack down.

dailyNews.title: Epstein victims sue Google, Trump administration for disclosing personal information
dailyNews.description: A lawsuit filed in Northern California alleges that Google's AI features generated contact information for Epstein victims.

dailyNews.title: White House launches app touting Trump's record, with some key omissions
dailyNews.description: The app includes a link to report tips to Immigrations and Customs Enforcement.

dailyNews.title: Oil prices close at highest level since 2022 as Iran negotiations fail to ease supply fears
dailyNews.description: Oil prices traded higher after U.S. President Donald Trump said Iran had allowed 10 oil tankers to pass through the Strait of Hormuz.

dailyNews.title: David Sacks says his time as Trump's crypto and AI czar has ended
dailyNews.description: The venture capitalist said he will still be a part of the White House's Technology committee and will help push Trump's AI plan forward.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.
